name: chapter-4
description: A dockerized fullstack application that uses a NodeJS backend, a PostgreSQL database, a Prisma ORM, and JWT Auth.

scripts.dev: node --watch --env-file=.env --experimental-strip-types --experimental-sqlite ./src/server.js & pid=$!; until curl -fs http://127.0.0.1:5000/ >/dev/null 2>&1; do sleep 0.2; done; open http://localhost:5000/?auth=1; wait $pid
